exploration_notes: Implemented the full task: (1) Added HttpResponseTooManyRequests (status 429) to django/http/response.py following the pattern of existing response classes like HttpResponseGone and HttpResponseServerError. (2) Updated django/http/__init__.py to import and export the new class. (3) Created django/middleware/ratelimit.py with a RateLimitMiddleware class that inherits from MiddlewareMixin, reads RATE_LIMIT_REQUESTS (default 100) and RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW (default 3600) from settings, uses Django's cac
